summary: Iteration 61: All 14 backend tests PASSED. Frontend UI verification confirmed Sale Book, GST Settings, and CashBook Party Type dropdown features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby warning in console for DialogContent (accessibility, non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend salebook.py: Correctly creates 3 ledger entries on sale voucher with cash (jama for total, nikasi for cash received, cash jama)
Backend salebook.py: Delete voucher correctly uses regex to cleanup all linked entries (sale_voucher*:{id})
Backend milling.py: By-product sale creates ledger entry with reference pattern byproduct:{id}, delete cleans up correctly
Frontend SaleBook.jsx: Stock overview shows 8 items with color-coded quantities (green positive, red negative)
Frontend SaleBook.jsx: GST calculation working correctly - subtotal + CGST + SGST or IGST = total
Frontend TransactionFormDialog.jsx: Party type dropdown has all 10 options including 'By-Product Sale' and 'Staff'
seed_data_creation: Test entries created and cleaned up during test execution
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sale Book feature fully implemented with stock overview (8 items), multi-item vouchers, GST types (none/CGST+SGST/IGST), ledger auto-entries. GST settings stored in DB settings collection with key='gst'. CashBook party_type dropdown has 10 options. By-product sales auto-create party ledger entries when buyer_name provided.

auto_entries: nikasi entry for cash received (account=ledger, ref=sale_voucher_cash:{id})
sale_book_ledger_integration.delete_cleanup: Deletes all entries with reference pattern sale_voucher*:{id}

byproduct_ledger_integration.auto_create: Creates ledger jama entry when buyer_name provided (party_type='By-Product Sale')
byproduct_ledger_integration.delete_cleanup: Deletes ledger entry with reference byproduct:{id}

frontend.stock_overview_cards: PASSED - 8 items visible with correct quantities
frontend.gst_calculation_display: PASSED - Shows Rs.375 for CGST and SGST
